product.applications: Packaging protection, compressed air drying, transformer protection, moisture control
product.specs: High low-humidity adsorption capacity; stable bead or granule form
product.overview: Silica gel is used as a desiccant to control moisture in storage, packaging, and process air applications.
product.technicalNotes: Appreciated for dry storage and low humidity systems where rapid moisture pickup is needed.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Recommended for moisture control in enclosed systems where low-humidity protection is critical.
